memory:memory/2026-04-30.md:435:460.snippet: ### All Endpoints Tested & Working ✅ Verified all 16+ API endpoints + bilingual SPA at `https://hnh-portal.brainsait-fadil.workers.dev/`. ### Key Fixes During Development - **Error 1101 (Worker threw exception):** `servePage()` returned a plain string, not a `Response` object. Fixed by wrapping in `new Response(html, {...})`. - **Route handler param mismatch:** For routes with no URL captures (`^/api/claims$`), `params = []` so `...params` adds nothing, shifting arguments. Fixed handlers to accept `url` as optional by using `new URL(req.url)` internally when `url` is undefined. - **D1 schema mismatch:** Pre-existing `claims` and `patients` tables have different columns than our migration. memory:memory/2026-04-30.md:687:715.snippet: - **Corporate info:** 700+ doctors, 500 clinics, 3,500+ employees, 1,200+ beds, 40,000+ surgeries/year - **AI system prompt** enriched with all real data — doctors, branches, offers, departments, NPHIES integration ### Key Fix: Providers Returning 0 - Root cause: `/api/providers` route handler was NOT async, called `getProviders()` without `env` - `getProviders()` without `env` called `getProvidersFromDB(undefined)` → returned null → fell back to static array of 12 placeholder doctors → client showed 0 - Fix: Made route handler `async`, call `getProviders(env)` with proper env, and D1 `stmt.all()` returns data from the 182 seeded providers ### Worker Configuration - **Name:** `hnh-portal`

memory:memory/2026-04-30.md:522:545.snippet: - **Voice chat flow:** User text → AI reply (trimmed to 500 chars) → TTS request (trimmed to 400 chars) → base64 audio → JSON response ## Technical Notes - Cloudflare Workers deploy size: ~191KB total / ~45KB gzip - Route: `mellissa.brainsait.org/*` attached to `mellissa-api` worker - D1 DB: `mellissa-db` (UUID: 9ad61eae-f053-4778-bfb7-8df965e422f6) - Cache-Control: `no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate` (prevents edge caching of HTML) - DNS: CNAME `mellissa.brainsait.org → mellissa-api.brainsait-fadil.workers.dev` (proxied) - Config version constant lives in `src/config.js` and drives `/api/health` response - CDN map assets (Leaflet CSS/JS) loaded from `unpkg.com` and `cdn.jsdelivr.net` - O
